name: design-workspace
title: Design Workspace
description: Design Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/design-workspace",
  "workspace": "design",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "panel",
    "button",
    "media-grid",
    "design-app",
    "design-catchall-page",

      "design-extensions-page",

      "design-catchall-block",

    ":",
    "design",
    "design-systems",
    "design-systems",
    "design",
    "examples",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "observability",
    "present",
    "settings",
    "team",
    "templates"

  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Design",
    "summary": "Design Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.design.shell",
      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Catchall",
          "route": "/design/:"
        },
        {
          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/design"
        },
        {
          "label": "Design Systems",
          "route": "/design/design-systems"
        },
        {
          "label": "Design Systems Setup",
          "route": "/design/design-systems/setup"
        },
        {
          "label": "Design Detail",
          "route": "/design/design/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Examples",
          "route": "/design/examples"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/design/extensions/:id/:slug"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail",
          "route": "/design/extensions/:id"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/design/:",
        "page": "page.design.catchall",
        "title": "Catchall",
        "blocks": [
          "block.design.catchall"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/design/app/routes/$.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/design",
        "page": "page.design.home",
        "title": "Design Home",
        "blocks": [
          "block.design.home"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/design/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/design/design-systems",
        "page": "page.design.design-systems",
        "title": "Design Systems",
        "blocks": [
          "block.design.design-systems"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/design/app/routes/design-systems.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/design/design-systems/setup",
        "page": "page.design.design-systems-setup",
        "title": "Design Systems Setup",
        "blocks": [
          "block.design.design-systems-setup"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/design/app/routes/design-systems_.setup.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/design/design/:id",
        "page": "page.design.design-detail",
        "title": "Design Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.design.design-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/design/app/routes/design.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/design/examples",

      },

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Design template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.

upstream.importedAs: jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
